title: rosa rubella subsp. mediterranea
intro: Rosa rubella subsp. mediterranea, also known as the Mediterranean wild rose, is a subspecies of rose that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa rubella subsp. mediterranea include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-aging effects. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
